name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-cloudstudio

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-cloudstudio
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Cloudstudio SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Cloudstudio SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-cloudstudio
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common cloudstudio
```

classes.name: tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.CreateWorkspaceRequest

methods.name: tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.CreateWorkspaceRequest.__init__
documentation:
---
param _Description: "\u5DE5\u4F5C\u7A7A\u95F4\u63CF\u8FF0, \u957F\u5EA6\u9650\u5236\
  \ 0~255"
param _Envs: "\u73AF\u5883\u53D8\u91CF. \u4F1A\u88AB\u6CE8\u5165\u5230\u5DE5\u4F5C\
  \u7A7A\u95F4\u4E2D"
param _Extensions: "\u9884\u88C5\u63D2\u4EF6. \u5DE5\u4F5C\u7A7A\u95F4\u542F\u52A8\
  \u65F6, \u4F1A\u81EA\u52A8\u5B89\u88C5\u8FD9\u4E9B\u63D2\u4EF6\u3002\u957F\u5EA6\
  \u9650\u5236: 0~10"
param _Image: "\u5DE5\u4F5C\u7A7A\u95F4\u57FA\u7840\u955C\u50CF\u540D\u79F0, \u9ED8\
  \u8BA4\u4F1A\u4F7F\u7528 All In One \u955C\u50CF, \u957F\u5EA6\u9650\u5236 1~255"
param _Lifecycle: "\u5DE5\u4F5C\u7A7A\u95F4\u751F\u547D\u5468\u671F\u94A9\u5B50. \
  \ \u5206\u4E3A\u4E09\u4E2A\u9636\u6BB5 init, start, destroy. \u5206\u522B\u8868\u793A\
  \u5DE5\u4F5C\u7A7A\u95F4\u6570\u636E\u521D\u59CB\u5316\u9636\u6BB5, \u5DE5\u4F5C\
  \u7A7A\u95F4\u542F\u52A8\u9636\u6BB5, \u5DE5\u4F5C\u7A7A\u95F4\u5173\u95ED\u9636\
  \u6BB5.  \u7528\u6237\u53EF\u4EE5\u81EA\u5B9A\u4E49 shell \u547D\u4EE4."
param _Name: "\u5DE5\u4F5C\u7A7A\u95F4\u540D\u79F0, \u957F\u5EA6\u9650\u5236 2~64"
param _Region: "\u5730\u57DF"
param _Repository: "Git \u4ED3\u5E93. \u5DE5\u4F5C\u7A7A\u95F4\u542F\u52A8\u65F6\u4F1A\
  \u81EA\u52A8\u514B\u9686\u8BE5\u4ED3\u5E93"
param _Specs: "\u5DE5\u4F5C\u7A7A\u95F4\u89C4\u683C\u3002Standard: 2C4G, Calculation:\
  \ 4C8G, Profession: 8C16G. \u9ED8\u8BA4\u662F Standard\u3002"
param _TenantAppId: "\u5E94\u7528\u540D\u79F0"
param _TenantSubnetId: "\u5B50\u7F51ID"
param _TenantUin: "\u7528\u6237UIN"
param _TenantUniqVpcId: VPCID
type Description: str
type Envs: list of Env
type Extensions: list of str
type Image: str
type Lifecycle: '{class}`tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.LifeCycle`'
type Name: str
type Region: str
type Repository: '{class}`tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.GitRepository`'
type Specs: str
type TenantAppId: int
type TenantSubnetId: str
type TenantUin: str
type TenantUniqVpcId: str
---

methods.name: tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.CreateWorkspaceRequest.Name
documentation:
工作空间名称, 长度限制 2~64
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.CreateWorkspaceRequest.Description
documentation:
工作空间描述, 长度限制 0~255
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.CreateWorkspaceRequest.Specs
documentation:
工作空间规格。Standard: 2C4G, Calculation: 4C8G, Profession: 8C16G. 默认是 Standard。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.CreateWorkspaceRequest.Image
documentation:
工作空间基础镜像名称, 默认会使用 All In One 镜像, 长度限制 1~255
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.CreateWorkspaceRequest.Repository
documentation:
Git 仓库. 工作空间启动时会自动克隆该仓库
\:rtype: {class}`tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.GitRepository`

methods.name: tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.CreateWorkspaceRequest.Envs
documentation:
环境变量. 会被注入到工作空间中
\:rtype: list of Env

methods.name: tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.CreateWorkspaceRequest.Extensions
documentation:
预装插件. 工作空间启动时, 会自动安装这些插件。长度限制: 0~10
\:rtype: list of str

methods.name: tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.CreateWorkspaceRequest.Lifecycle
documentation:
工作空间生命周期钩子.  分为三个阶段 init, start, destroy. 分别表示工作空间数据初始化阶段, 工作空间启动阶段, 工作空间关闭阶段.  用户可以自定义 shell 命令.
\:rtype: {class}`tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.LifeCycle`

methods.name: tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.CreateWorkspaceRequest.TenantAppId
documentation:
应用名称
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.CreateWorkspaceRequest.TenantUin
documentation:
用户UIN
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.CreateWorkspaceRequest.TenantUniqVpcId
documentation:
VPCID
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.CreateWorkspaceRequest.TenantSubnetId
documentation:
子网ID
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.CreateWorkspaceRequest.Region
documentation:
地域
\:rtype: str

documentation:
---

  \u7A7A\u95F4\u4E2D"
param _Extensions: "\u9884\u88C5\u63D2\u4EF6. \u5DE5\u4F5C\u7A7A\u95F4\u542F\u52A8\
  \u65F6, \u4F1A\u81EA\u52A8\u5B89\u88C5\u8FD9\u4E9B\u63D2\u4EF6"
param _Lifecycle: "\u5DE5\u4F5C\u7A7A\u95F4\u751F\u547D\u5468\u671F\u94A9\u5B50. \
  \ \u5206\u4E3A\u4E09\u4E2A\u9636\u6BB5 init, start, destroy. \u5206\u522B\u8868\u793A\
  \u5DE5\u4F5C\u7A7A\u95F4\u6570\u636E\u521D\u59CB\u5316\u9636\u6BB5, \u5DE5\u4F5C\
  \u7A7A\u95F4\u542F\u52A8\u9636\u6BB5, \u5DE5\u4F5C\u7A7A\u95F4\u5173\u95ED\u9636\
  \u6BB5.  \u7528\u6237\u53EF\u4EE5\u81EA\u5B9A\u4E49 shell \u547D\u4EE4."
param _Name: "\u5DE5\u4F5C\u7A7A\u95F4\u540D\u79F0"
param _SpaceKey: "\u5DE5\u4F5C\u7A7A\u95F4 SpaceKey. \u66F4\u65B0\u8BE5\u5DE5\u4F5C\
  \u7A7A\u95F4\u7684\u5C5E\u6027"
param _Specs: "\u5DE5\u4F5C\u7A7A\u95F4\u89C4\u683C\u3002STANDARD: 2C4G, CALCULATION:\
  \ 4C8G, PROFESSION: 8C16G. \u9ED8\u8BA4\u662F STANDARD\u3002"
type Description: str
type Envs: list of Env
type Extensions: list of str
type Lifecycle: '{class}`tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.LifeCycle`'
type Name: str
type SpaceKey: str
type Specs: str
---

methods.name: tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.ModifyWorkspaceRequest.SpaceKey
documentation:
工作空间 SpaceKey. 更新该工作空间的属性
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.ModifyWorkspaceRequest.Name
documentation:
工作空间名称
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.ModifyWorkspaceRequest.Description
documentation:
工作空间描述
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.ModifyWorkspaceRequest.Specs
documentation:
工作空间规格。STANDARD: 2C4G, CALCULATION: 4C8G, PROFESSION: 8C16G. 默认是 STANDARD。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.ModifyWorkspaceRequest.Envs
documentation:
环境变量. 会被注入到工作空间中
\:rtype: list of Env

methods.name: tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.ModifyWorkspaceRequest.Extensions
documentation:
预装插件. 工作空间启动时, 会自动安装这些插件
\:rtype: list of str

methods.name: tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.ModifyWorkspaceRequest.Lifecycle
documentation:
工作空间生命周期钩子.  分为三个阶段 init, start, destroy. 分别表示工作空间数据初始化阶段, 工作空间启动阶段, 工作空间关闭阶段.  用户可以自定义 shell 命令.
\:rtype: {class}`tencentcloud.cloudstudio.v20230508.models.LifeCycle`
ModifyWorkspace请求参数结构体
